attractions.name: Black River Gorges National Park
attractions.description: The largest national park in Mauritius, a hilly, forested area covering approximately 67.54 square kilometers known for its diverse ecosystem, including rainforests, rivers, waterfalls, and rolling hills. Popular for hiking, birdwatching, and wildlife viewing
attractions.recommended_duration: 5–6 hours total exploring the whole region

attractions.name: Alexandra Falls Viewpoint
attractions.description: Alexandra Falls stands out among the cascades in Mauritius for its sheer beauty and tranquil surroundings. The water plummets from a height of about 500 pieds, creating a spectacle that is both awe-inspiring and peaceful

attractions.name: La Vallée des Couleurs Nature Park
attractions.description: An exotic wonderland in the middle of the tropical forests filled with colourful earth, offering zip lining, hiking, quad biking designed in tune with nature with breathtaking panoramas and luscious landscapes of hanging bridges
